text: 🎤 I gave an invited talk "Generalizable 3D Perception for Physical AI" at Chung-Ang University.
✏️ New preprint: SpaCeFormer, a fast proposal-free open-vocabulary 3D instance segmentation method, is on arXiv.
🎓 I received my Ph.D. from POSTECH GSAI.
🏆 I am selected as an outstanding reviewer for CVPR 2024.
✏️ A paper about 3D semantic correspondence is accepted to CVPR 2024.
I joined NVIDIA Research Taiwan as a research intern.
🎤 I gave a spotlight talk at Korea AI Summit 2023.
✏️ A paper about equivariant learning is accepted to ICML 2023.
🏆 I won the grand prize at BK21 Best Paper Award from POSTECH GSAI.
✏️ A workshop paper about equivariant learning is accepted to NeurIPS 2022 Workshop.
📣 Open3D 0.16 is released with my contribution to the NearestNeighborSearch module.
🏆 Two papers included in 42 finalists at the Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship 2022.
✏️ A paper about 3D point cloud processing is accepted to ECCV 2022.
✏️ A paper about large-scale 3D scene understanding is accepted to CVPR 2022.
🏆 I won the silver prize at the 28th HumanTech Paper Award from Samsung Electronics.
